name: Orange Corn Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the egg, milk, vegetable oil, and grated orange peel.
3. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened.
4. Fill greased muffin tins 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 13-15 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Remove from the oven and serve warm.
Can substitute lemon peel
Yields 12 muffins
Posted By: rubyd@wam.umd.edu (Teresa Marie Cannon)
